suite.name: AuthorScreen

kw.name: Run Keywords
kw.doc: Executes all the given keywords in a sequence.

test.name: Verify that added general details of procedure are correctly visible to user in Preview.
test.status: Parent suite setup failed: Variable '${AUTHOR1_EMAIL}' not found.

test.name: Verify the Search functionality on Preventive Troubleshooting Page
test.status: Parent suite setup failed: Variable '${AUTHOR1_EMAIL}' not found.

test.name: Verify added User Inputs are visible in Preview mode
test.status: Parent suite setup failed: Variable '${AUTHOR1_EMAIL}' not found.

test.name: Verify that user is able to Preview a procedure.
test.status: Parent suite setup failed: Variable '${AUTHOR1_EMAIL}' not found.

test.name: Verify added Preventive Troubleshooting are visible in Preview mode
test.status: Parent suite setup failed: Variable '${AUTHOR1_EMAIL}' not found.

test.name: Verify that User is able to add draft version of procedure by clicking on 'Add New' button
test.status: Parent suite setup failed: Variable '${AUTHOR1_EMAIL}' not found.

test.name: Verify that user is able to publish the procedure after adding steps in the procedure
test.status: Parent suite setup failed: Variable '${AUTHOR1_EMAIL}' not found.

test.name: Verify that an Author can add a new Option in a procedure step
test.status: Parent suite setup failed: Variable '${AUTHOR1_EMAIL}' not found.

test.name: Verify that the Author can define a troubleshooting entry with all necessary fields
test.status: Parent suite setup failed: Variable '${AUTHOR1_EMAIL}' not found.

test.name: Verify that user is able to remove the added PPE
test.status: Parent suite setup failed: Variable '${AUTHOR1_EMAIL}' not found.

test.name: Verify that user is able to add attachments to the step
test.status: Parent suite setup failed: Variable '${AUTHOR1_EMAIL}' not found.

test.name: Verify the functionality of Cancel button on the Add New Procedure Page
test.status: Parent suite setup failed: Variable '${AUTHOR1_EMAIL}' not found.

test.name: Verify that UI of User Inputs page
test.status: Parent suite setup failed: Variable '${AUTHOR1_EMAIL}' not found.

test.name: Verify the functionality of "Add Block" button
test.status: Parent suite setup failed: Variable '${AUTHOR1_EMAIL}' not found.

test.name: Verify that user can add any number of options using "+Add options"
test.status: Parent suite setup failed: Variable '${AUTHOR1_EMAIL}' not found.

test.name: Verify that user cannot create a user input form without filling the mandatory field
test.status: Parent suite setup failed: Variable '${AUTHOR1_EMAIL}' not found.

test.name: Verify that user can Preview the block by clicking on Preview button
test.status: Parent suite setup failed: Variable '${AUTHOR1_EMAIL}' not found.

test.name: Verify that "Delete Block" becomes enabled when user adds another block
test.status: Parent suite setup failed: Variable '${AUTHOR1_EMAIL}' not found.

test.name: Verify that the procedure version is correctly updated based on the selected update type (Minor/Major)
test.status: Parent suite setup failed: Variable '${AUTHOR1_EMAIL}' not found.

test.name: Verify that the CRCO number field enforces a character limit
test.status: Parent suite setup failed: Variable '${AUTHOR1_EMAIL}' not found.

test.name: Verify that the Operator can submit a non-conformance report if an issue is not listed
test.status: Parent suite setup failed: Variable '${AUTHOR1_EMAIL}' not found.

test.name: Verify the delete icon functionality against every option
test.status: Parent suite setup failed: Variable '${AUTHOR1_EMAIL}' not found.

test.name: Verify the functionality of Cross and Cancel button on Publish pop-up screen
test.status: Parent suite setup failed: Variable '${AUTHOR1_EMAIL}' not found.

test.name: Verify that no PPE's are displayed in the PPE section while filing general details of the procedures.
test.status: Parent suite setup failed: Variable '${AUTHOR1_EMAIL}' not found.

test.name: Verify the functionality of cross icon on instruction box
test.status: Parent suite setup failed: Variable '${AUTHOR1_EMAIL}' not found.

test.name: Verify new step is added on clicking '+' icon visible on closed general details section
test.status: Parent suite setup failed: Variable '${AUTHOR1_EMAIL}' not found.

test.name: Verify that data added within the steps is correctly visible to user.
test.status: Parent suite setup failed: Variable '${AUTHOR1_EMAIL}' not found.

test.name: Verify added PPE's are visible in Preview mode.
test.status: Parent suite setup failed: Variable '${AUTHOR1_EMAIL}' not found.

test.name: Verify added BOM/BOT are visible in Preview mode
test.status: Parent suite setup failed: Variable '${AUTHOR1_EMAIL}' not found.

test.name: Verify that on the top of Preview page, version information and Procedure Name is correct
test.status: Parent suite setup failed: Variable '${AUTHOR1_EMAIL}' not found.

test.name: Verify functionality of Delete Block button
test.status: Parent suite setup failed: Variable '${AUTHOR1_EMAIL}' not found.

test.name: Verify the functionality of Cancel button on Add instructions page.
test.status: Parent suite setup failed: Variable '${AUTHOR1_EMAIL}' not found.

test.name: Verify that multiple Options can be added to a single step.
test.status: Parent suite setup failed: Variable '${AUTHOR1_EMAIL}' not found.

test.name: Verify that data added within the steps is correctly visible to user.
test.status: Parent suite setup failed: Variable '${AUTHOR1_EMAIL}' not found.

test.name: Verify that user is able to view added attachment in both Gallery and Grid view in Preview mode
test.status: Parent suite setup failed: Variable '${AUTHOR1_EMAIL}' not found.

test.name: Verify that novice only checkbox is marked as checked if a step is marked as Novice only.
test.status: Parent suite setup failed: Variable '${AUTHOR1_EMAIL}' not found.

test.name: Verify that user is able to group steps.
test.status: Parent suite setup failed: Variable '${AUTHOR1_EMAIL}' not found.

test.name: Verify that user is able to edit the name of step group.
test.status: Parent suite setup failed: Variable '${AUTHOR1_EMAIL}' not found.

test.name: Verify that user is able to make any number of step groups.
test.status: Parent suite setup failed: Variable '${AUTHOR1_EMAIL}' not found.

test.name: Verify the UI of Add New Procedure Screen.
test.status: Parent suite setup failed: Variable '${AUTHOR1_EMAIL}' not found.

test.name: Verify that user is able to add instructions.
test.status: Parent suite setup failed: Variable '${AUTHOR1_EMAIL}' not found.

test.name: Verify that the Author can edit an existing troubleshooting entry.
test.status: Parent suite setup failed: Variable '${AUTHOR1_EMAIL}' not found.

test.name: Verify that the Author can delete an existing troubleshooting entry.
test.status: Parent suite setup failed: Variable '${AUTHOR1_EMAIL}' not found.

test.name: Verify the system behavior when the Release Note field is left empty
test.status: Parent suite setup failed: Variable '${AUTHOR1_EMAIL}' not found.

test.name: Verify that user is able to change the language of instructions box from side bar.
test.status: Parent suite setup failed: Variable '${AUTHOR1_EMAIL}' not found.

test.name: Verify that user is able to access the toolkit while writing instructions for the step.
test.status: Parent suite setup failed: Variable '${AUTHOR1_EMAIL}' not found.

test.name: Verify that input fields are dynamically displayed based on checkbox selection in the form module.
test.status: Parent suite setup failed: Variable '${AUTHOR1_EMAIL}' not found.

test.name: Verify that the approval managers and co-authors are correctly displayed in the Publish screen.
test.status: Parent suite setup failed: Variable '${AUTHOR1_EMAIL}' not found.

test.name: Verify that users can modify the list of approval managers and co-authors before publishing.
test.status: Parent suite setup failed: Variable '${AUTHOR1_EMAIL}' not found.

test.name: Verify that user is able to delete a steps
test.status: Parent suite setup failed: Variable '${AUTHOR1_EMAIL}' not found.

test.name: Verify that user is able to delete steps from a step group.
test.status: Parent suite setup failed: Variable '${AUTHOR1_EMAIL}' not found.

test.name: Verify user is able to zoom/in-zoom/out images in preview mode
test.status: Parent suite setup failed: Variable '${AUTHOR1_EMAIL}' not found.

test.name: Verify that User is Able to Duplicate the Draft Procedure
test.status: Parent suite setup failed: Variable '${AUTHOR1_EMAIL}' not found.

test.name: Verify the user is able to delete folder from more option
test.status: Parent suite setup failed: Variable '${AUTHOR1_EMAIL}' not found.

test.name: Verify that User Is Able To Duplicate The Published Procedure
test.status: Parent suite setup failed: Variable '${AUTHOR1_EMAIL}' not found.

test.name: Verify the user is able to delete the folder from the list page
test.status: Parent suite setup failed: Variable '${AUTHOR1_EMAIL}' not found.

test.name: Verify The Duplicated procedure should be created inside the folder if it is duplicated there.
test.status: Parent suite setup failed: Variable '${AUTHOR1_EMAIL}' not found.

kw.name: Close All Browsers
kw.doc: Closes all open browsers and resets the browser cache.

suite.status: Suite setup failed: Variable '${AUTHOR1_EMAIL}' not found.
